claims.claim: Aliyah passport recommended valid at least 2 years
claims.raw_snippet: valid for at least another 2 years

claims.claim: Effective Sept 30 2024, marriage certificate must show pre-marriage civil status of both spouses
claims.raw_snippet: From Sept 30, 2024 onward, must show pre-marriage status

claims.claim: From Nov 2024 Shinui Ma'amad applicants (aliyah from within Israel) need background checks from every country lived in for 6+ months
claims.raw_snippet: From Nov 2024 onward, people who undergo Shinui Ma'amad - Aliyah from within Israel...will be asked to present background checks from all countries where they have lived for more than one year

claims.claim: Background check required from country of birth, every country of continuous residence over 1 year after age 14, and every country of current citizenship
claims.raw_snippet: Your country of birth; Any country where you've lived continuously for over 1 year (after age 14); Any country of which you currently hold citizenship

claims.claim: Free Ulpan Aleph entitlement is 500 hours within 18 months of aliyah
claims.raw_snippet: אולפן עברית לעולים, 500 שעות לימוד

claims.claim: Ulpan requires 80% attendance minimum to stay in the subsidized track
claims.raw_snippet: requires 80% attendance

claims.claim: Second subsidized Ulpan course available within 10 years of aliyah; only one of the two can be at a private/recognized institution
claims.raw_snippet: Second course available within 10 years (only one can be private)

claims.claim: Ezrach Oleh applicants need proof of residence outside Israel for the past 7 years and a 7-year table of entries and exits
claims.raw_snippet: Proof of residence outside Israel for the past 7 years; Table of entries and exits to/from Israel (7-year history)

claims.claim: Ezrach Oleh is someone born outside of Israel to an Israeli father or mother who held Israeli citizenship at the time of your birth
claims.raw_snippet: born outside of Israel to an Israeli father or mother (who held Israeli citizenship at the time of your birth)

claims.claim: Katin Chozer is a returning minor who departed Israel before turning 14
claims.raw_snippet: born in Israel or immigrated as a child but departed before turning 14

claims.claim: Katin Chozer applicants under 30 need parental documentation including parents' declaration, work proof for past 5 years, parents' entry/exit records, proof parents resided abroad during applicant's ages 14-18
claims.raw_snippet: For applicants under 30: Additional parental documentation is required, including their declaration, work proof (past 5 years), entry/exit records, and proof they resided abroad during your ages 14-18

claims.claim: Aliyah BaShenit is not granted automatically; each case is reviewed individually by Misrad HaPnim, Bituach Leumi, Misrad HaKlita, and Rashut HaMisim independently
claims.raw_snippet: Aliyah BaShenit is not granted automatically, and each case is reviewed individually

claims.claim: Olim have a guaranteed right to declare ARLI (renouncing Israeli citizenship) within 3 months of their aliyah date
claims.raw_snippet: Olim have a guaranteed right to declare ARLI up to three months from their Aliyah date

claims.claim: ARLI declaration is for individuals over 18 who made Aliyah or are foreign residents; one parent can declare for family with both spouses' consent
claims.raw_snippet: Only individuals over 18 who made Aliyah or are foreign residents may declare ARLI; One parent can proceed with both spouses' consent

claims.claim: Apostille is an official government authentication certificate; required from Hague Convention signatory countries; non-Hague countries use consular legalisation
claims.raw_snippet: official government authentication certificate added to documents so they will be recognized when presented in another country; A comprehensive listing for all Hague Convention signatories

claims.claim: Sal Klita is provided to all olim who arrived under the Law of Return
claims.raw_snippet: סל קליטה לעולים מכוח חוק השבות

claims.claim: Section 14 ten-year exemption on foreign-source income for olim and toshav chozer vatik
claims.raw_snippet: סעיף 14 לפקודת מס הכנסה, פטור ל-10 שנים על הכנסות מחו"ל

claims.claim: Foreign driver's license valid for up to 1 year from last entry to Israel; clock resets if 6+ months abroad
claims.raw_snippet: תוקף רישיון נהיגה זר עד שנה מהכניסה האחרונה לישראל

claims.claim: Misrad HaAliyah V'HaKlita is the Ministry of Aliyah and Integration
claims.raw_snippet: Ministry of Aliyah and Integration

claims.claim: Israel Tax Authority (Rashut HaMisim) handles Section 14 exemptions
claims.raw_snippet: Israel Tax Authority

claims.claim: רשות המסים אחראית על סעיף 14
claims.raw_snippet: רשות המסים

claims.claim: Jewish Agency (Sochnut) handles file opening and document upload
claims.raw_snippet: Aliyah

claims.claim: הסוכנות היהודית מטפלת בפתיחת תיק והעלאת מסמכים
claims.raw_snippet: עלייה

claims.claim: klita.gov.il is the personal area portal for olim
claims.raw_snippet: אזור אישי, סל קליטה

claims.claim: Kolzchut olim and returning residents category page
claims.raw_snippet: עולים ותושבים חוזרים

claims.claim: Nefesh B'Nefesh provides flight subsidies and rights summaries for English-speaking olim
claims.raw_snippet: Nefesh B'Nefesh

claims.claim: Bituach Leumi handles registration and benefit eligibility
claims.raw_snippet: ביטוח לאומי

claims.claim: Shivat Zion knowledge base provides plain-English explainers for aliyah procedures
claims.raw_snippet: Aliyah Benefits, Aliyah Within Israel, Plan your Integration, Special Procedures, Special Status, Law of Return

claims.claim: Bituach Leumi service phone is *6050
